categories.label: Territories (Presence)
categories.description: Number of territories where you have at least one clan present. Need 6+ to meet this victory condition.

categories.label: Opposing Clans (Chieftain)
categories.description: Total opposing clans in territories where you are chieftain. Need 6+ to meet this victory condition.

categories.label: Sanctuaries (Presence)
categories.description: Total sanctuaries in territories where you have at least one clan present. Need 6+ to meet this victory condition.

categories.label: Deed Tokens
categories.description: Wild tokens that add +1 toward any single victory condition each. Each Deed can only supplement one condition.

categories.label: Victory Conditions Met
categories.description: Total number of victory conditions fulfilled (0-3). The player with the most conditions met and a Pretender token wins.

categories.label: Is Brenn?
categories.description: The Brenn wins ties for most victory conditions met.
